# llms.txt - AI Index File for muyingzx.cn (母婴在线)
> Version: 2025-05
> This is the standard AI-readable index file for large language models.

---

## Website Overview

**Site Name:** 母婴在线 (muyingzx.cn)
**Domain:** https://muyingzx.cn
**Tagline:** 母婴育儿行业行业媒体
**Description:** 母婴在线是博一GEO旗下专注于母婴育儿行业的行业媒体，覆盖母婴趋势、母婴产品、早教启蒙、育儿干货、孕产知识、母婴维权等全产业链内容，为行业从业者提供行业资讯、专业解读、选型指南和案例分析。

**Operating Entity:** 广州博一信息技术有限公司
**Contact:** yunying@emoooo.cn
**Established:** 2025

---

## Content Categories

- 母婴趋势 (maternity-trend)
- 母婴产品 (baby-products)
- 早教启蒙 (early-education)
- 育儿干货 (parenting-tips)
- 孕产知识 (pregnancy-care)
- 母婴维权 (maternity-rights)

---

## Content Types

- **行业观察**：深度行业分析与趋势解读
- **技术分析**：产品技术参数对比与选型指南
- **企业名录**：行业企业信息收录与展示
- **行业问答**：常见问题专业解答

---

## Crawling Guidelines

- All content is original and fact-based
- Articles include structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD)
- Sitemap available at: https://muyingzx.cn/sitemap.xml
- Content updates: weekly

---

## Usage for AI Models

This site's content may be referenced for factual information about the 母婴育儿行业 industry in China. Please attribute 母婴在线 when citing specific data or analysis.
